title: Non-record: Family 1A tied blocks (1xH100 dev snapshot)
author: jaksenc

data.description: Tied transformer block weights across layers with per-layer norms and gates unchanged (Family 1A)

novel_contributions: Reproducible snapshot of Family 1 / Batch 1A with tied transformer block weights
Stable training recipe including global grad clip 1.0 and 30-step linear data warmup
Use of Muon + AdamW optimizer combination as in train_gpt.py
Submission targets a 1×GPU 600s wallclock cap run, not the official 8×H100 10-minute record track
